title: RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER - 211info
text: RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center offering lunch, food boxes, laundry, showers, computers with internet access, assistance with housing applications and cover letters, and temporary mailing addresses. May also provide pet food, hygiene supplies, and grab and go foods as supplies allow. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday 9am-3pm, Friday 10am-2pm (541) 962-7994 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 962-7994 Main phone Main phone (541) 962-7994 Alternate (541) 910-3056 Program Lead Maggie Mayhem [email protected] Alternate (541) 910-6265 Housing Coordinator Frederick Kiel [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Union County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between D Avenue and G Avenue Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Housing Issues Community Meals Drop In Centers Food Pantries Laundry Facilities Prejob Guidance Public Internet Access Sites Public Showers/Baths Temporary Mailing Address If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
